candidate.name: Gurudevi Lavanya Gopisetty
candidate.title: MS Computer Science Graduate | ML Engineer | AI & Data Science Professional
candidate.summary: Recent MS Computer Science graduate from California State University, Dominguez Hills (GPA 3.9, Dec 2025) with 2+ years of professional experience at Cognizant. Expertise spans Machine Learning, Data Science, Computer Vision, Generative AI, Data Analytics, and DevOps. Known for delivering strong quantitative outcomes — 90% pipeline throughput improvements, 88%+ model accuracies, and real-time deployed systems.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
education.role: Graduate Assistant — contributed to faculty research, course development, and student mentorship

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering / B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering

experience.title: Graduate Assistant — Data Science, AI & Cloud Research
responsibilities: Assisted professors with EDA, statistical hypothesis testing, and visualization using Python for research publications
Collaborated on LLM research exploring how GPT-4 reasons about low-level language constructs (C, memory management, pointers)
Designed and evaluated student ML projects: customer churn predictor (86%), sentiment analysis pipeline (BERT), LSTM time-series forecasting
Built benchmark comparison framework in PyTorch evaluating YOLOv5 vs YOLOv8
Set up Label Studio and Roboflow annotation pipelines for computer vision research
Built GitHub Actions CI/CD workflows for automated lab deployment
Maintained Docker/Kubernetes lab environments for 30+ students
Mentored 30+ undergraduates in ML, Data Structures, Python, and DevOps — improving project scores by 15–20%

experience.title: Data Scientist
responsibilities: Built supervised ML models (Random Forest, XGBoost, Logistic Regression) achieving 88% accuracy in pipeline failure prediction, reducing downtime by 35%
Developed TF-IDF and BERT-based text classification to auto-categorize 10K+ monthly support tickets, cutting manual triaging time by 50%
Engineered 100+ features from structured and unstructured data; EDA improved model F1-score by 18%
Designed MLflow experiment tracking and Tableau dashboards to monitor model drift and KPIs in near real-time
Conducted A/B tests and cross-validation frameworks before production rollout

experience.title: Data Analyst
responsibilities: Architected automated ETL validation pipelines across 200+ data scenarios, boosting throughput by 90% and saving 70+ hours/month
Engineered advanced SQL validation protocols improving data accuracy by 30% for downstream modeling and reporting
Maintained end-to-end data lineage tracking ensuring audit-readiness across large-scale performance datasets
Built Power BI, Tableau, and Excel dashboards that directly informed senior stakeholder strategy

projects.title: Autonomous Job Application Agent
projects.description: Fully autonomous multi-agent system that handles the entire job application workflow — scraping job postings, parsing descriptions, extracting fields, and intelligently filling out forms without human intervention.
projects.architecture: Three specialized agents: scraping agent (Playwright), parsing agent (GPT-4o), submission agent. State-machine workflow managed by LangGraph.
projects.key_outcome: 85% form-fill accuracy across diverse job portals
challenges_solved: Robust error handling and retry logic

projects.title: Candidate AI Assistant (RAG Pipeline)
projects.description: Conversational RAG pipeline that answers nuanced context-specific questions about a candidate's background without hallucinating. Built on Pinecone vector DB and LangChain orchestration.
projects.architecture: Document chunking → OpenAI embeddings → Pinecone vector storage → semantic similarity retrieval → context assembly → LLM response generation + semantic caching layer
projects.key_outcome: ~40% reduction in redundant API calls via semantic caching

projects.title: Self-Driving Semantic Segmentation (U-Net)
projects.description: U-Net architecture trained from scratch in PyTorch on Cityscapes dataset (2,975 training, 500 validation urban driving images) for pixel-level semantic segmentation.

projects.title: Automatic Parking Slot Detection
projects.description: Fine-tuned YOLOv8 on custom-built annotated dataset of parking lot images. Handles varied lighting, partial occlusion, shadows, and perspective distortion.

projects.title: Real-Time Hand Gesture Recognition & Controller
projects.description: Gesture-controlled gaming interface running in real-time on CPU. Two-stage pipeline: YOLOv8 hand detection + MediaPipe 21-keypoint landmark extraction + gesture classification.
projects.key_outcome: 85% gesture accuracy at 30+ FPS on CPU

projects.title: CNN Digit Recognition & Gesture Detection
projects.description: Custom 5-layer CNN with batch normalization, dropout, and cosine annealing LR scheduling. Trained on MNIST then extended to real-world gesture classification.

projects.title: Facial Recognition — Siamese Network
projects.description: One-shot facial recognition using Siamese Network with twin CNN branches trained with Contrastive Loss. Inference via cosine distance against a single reference image.

projects.title: Automated Essay Scoring System
projects.description: Fine-tuned BERT for automated essay scoring with bias analysis across demographic subsets. Uses Hugging Face Transformers with custom regression scoring head.

projects.title: Customer Churn Prediction & Segmentation
projects.description: Comprehensive churn prediction and segmentation on 50K+ customer records. XGBoost with SHAP explainability + K-Means clustering for actionable retention strategy.

projects.title: Sales Performance Dashboard & Forecasting
projects.description: End-to-end analytics solution: SQL aggregation → ARIMA forecasting → interactive Tableau executive dashboard with drill-down on 500K+ transactions.

projects.title: ETL Pipeline Automation & Data Quality Framework
projects.description: Modular ETL framework with configurable validation: null detection, type validation, referential integrity, Z-score and IQR anomaly flagging. Pluggable architecture across 8 downstream teams.
projects.key_outcome: 40% reduction in pipeline errors | monitoring for 8 downstream teams

projects.title: Kubernetes CI/CD Deployment Pipeline
projects.description: Full CI/CD pipeline: Docker build → unit/integration tests → Trivy security scan → AWS ECR push → Kubernetes rolling deployment with automated rollback in under 2 minutes.
projects.key_outcome: Zero-downtime deployments | automated rollback in under 2 minutes

projects.title: Cloud Infrastructure Automation with Terraform
projects.description: Modular Terraform configurations for complete production-grade AWS environment: VPC, EC2, RDS PostgreSQL, S3, IAM with least privilege. Remote state in S3 + DynamoDB locking.
projects.key_outcome: Full environment provisioned in under 10 minutes | zero manual console work

projects.title: Monitoring & Alerting Observability Stack
projects.description: Complete observability stack with Prometheus scraping, custom Grafana dashboards (p50/p95/p99 latency, error rates), and Alertmanager threshold-based alerting with runbooks.
projects.key_outcome: Real-time multi-service monitoring with automated on-call alerting

domain_expertise.summary: Supervised/unsupervised learning, model deployment, experiment tracking, predictive analytics, NLP, and feature engineering. Industry experience at Cognizant as both Data Analyst and Data Scientist.

Full CV pipeline from dataset curation (Roboflow, Label Studio) to training (U-Net, YOLO, CNN, Siamese) and deployment (FastAPI, Docker). Projects span segmentation, detection, recognition, and real-time inference.
RAG pipeline design, vector embeddings, semantic caching, multi-agent orchestration with LangGraph, and prompt engineering with GPT-4o. Focus on production-grade agentic systems.
ETL automation, SQL engineering, Power BI and Tableau dashboard delivery, data governance, and stakeholder reporting. Proven 90% throughput improvement and 70+ hours/month saved.

CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and Jenkins, container orchestration with Docker and Kubernetes, Infrastructure as Code with Terraform, monitoring with Prometheus/Grafana, and AWS cloud provisioning.

qa_pairs.question: Does Lavanya know Python?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Python is Lavanya's primary language at expert level. She has used Python across ML pipelines, ETL automation, data analysis, API development with FastAPI and Flask, scripting, and agentic AI systems — across 2+ years of industry and academic work.

qa_pairs.question: Has Lavanya worked with RAG pipelines?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes. Lavanya built a production-grade RAG pipeline using Pinecone as vector DB and LangChain for orchestration. The system includes document chunking, OpenAI embeddings, semantic similarity retrieval, and an innovative semantic caching layer that reduced redundant API calls by ~40%.

qa_pairs.question: Does Lavanya have industry experience?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes. Lavanya has 2+ years of industry experience at Cognizant in Chennai, India — first as a Data Analyst (Feb 2021 – Jan 2022) and then as a Data Scientist (Feb 2022 – Jul 2023). She built and deployed production ML models, ETL pipelines, and BI dashboards.

qa_pairs.question: Can Lavanya work with Docker and Kubernetes?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes. Lavanya has hands-on experience with Docker and Kubernetes. She built a full Kubernetes CI/CD deployment pipeline using GitHub Actions with zero-downtime deployments and automated rollback in under 2 minutes. She also maintained Docker/Kubernetes lab environments for 30+ students.

qa_pairs.question: Does Lavanya know computer vision?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Computer Vision is one of Lavanya's deepest domains with 6 distinct projects covering semantic segmentation (U-Net), object detection (YOLOv8), gesture recognition (MediaPipe), facial recognition (Siamese Network), and digit classification (CNN). She also has experience with dataset annotation using Roboflow and Label Studio.

qa_pairs.question: What is Lavanya's GPA?
qa_pairs.answer: Lavanya graduated with a GPA of 3.9/4.0 from her Master of Science in Computer Science at California State University, Dominguez Hills (Dec 2025).

qa_pairs.question: Does Lavanya have cloud experience?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes. Lavanya has hands-on AWS experience across EC2, S3, RDS, ECR, SageMaker, VPC, and IAM — all provisioned through Terraform IaC. She has also deployed Kubernetes clusters on AWS EKS and has GCP exposure.

qa_pairs.question: Has Lavanya used LangChain or LangGraph?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes. Lavanya has used LangChain in her RAG pipeline project and LangGraph to build a multi-agent autonomous job application system with state-machine workflow management across three specialized agents.
